description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use an ubuntu-latest job in an Arch Linux container with a matrix strategy for gcc and clang compilers. Install dependencies, check out fcitx/fcitx5 repository, cache fcitx5 data files, build and install fcitx5 and fcitx5-rime with custom CMake options, and run tests and CodeQL analysis.
